---
name: Contribute a site map
about: Propose a new website for webnav to map (the highest-leverage contribution)
title: "[map] "
labels: site-map
---

**Site**
Domain (e.g. `example.com`) + entry URL.

**Why it's a good map**
Is it stable? Sanctioned for automation (a demo/sandbox), or a real site? What
navigation flavour does it add (search→results→detail, multi-step form, table +
pagination, login → dashboard, …)?

**Safety check (required)**
- [ ] No real transactions / money (or commit points are clearly marked so they're never auto-fired)
- [ ] Not bot-walled / ToS-hostile to automation
- [ ] No credentials needed, OR demo creds are publicly published (link them — never paste real ones)

**Map sketch (optional)**
The key states + how you move between them, if you've explored it.
